channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Australia Enforces Code of Conduct for Online Dating Platforms
item.description: Australia introduces code of conduct for online dating industry to protect users from sexual violence and harassment
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: Gavin Newsom Vetoes AI Safety Bill Amid Industry Objections - California's Governor cites concerns over innovation hindrance and lack of empirical analysis
item.description: California Governor Gavin Newsom vetoes a hotly contested artificial intelligence safety bill, citing industry concerns over potential innovation stifling and lack of science-based trajectory analysis.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: Samsung and Google Accused of Anti-Competitive Practices in App Distribution | Tech Industry Lawsuit
item.description: Epic Games sues Google and Samsung over alleged anti-competitive practices in app distribution, accusing the tech companies of blocking third-party competition.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: The Rise of Hybrid IT Infrastructure: A Balanced Approach for Enterprise Success
item.description: Discover the shift towards hybrid IT infrastructure, where enterprises combine on-prem, colocation, private cloud, and public cloud environments to achieve better solutions, agility, scalability, cost control, and a more nuanced approach to security.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: NASA Astronauts Welcome New Rides Home Amid SpaceX and Boeing Tensions
item.description: NASA astronauts welcome new rides home as tensions rise between SpaceX and Boeing over safety concerns and Starliner issues.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
